description:
Prepare a secure copy of the financial dataset for an external auditor. 

1. Create a file clone of the existing volume '/home/ga/Volumes/data_volume.hc' and name it 'financial_transfer.hc' in the same directory.
2. Change the password of the NEW clone ('financial_transfer.hc') to 'Transfer#2024' and set its PIM to '485'. Do NOT change the password of the original master volume.
3. Mount the new clone and create a text file inside named 'transmittal_notice.txt' containing the text: 'Authorized for transfer to External Auditor.'
4. Dismount the volume when finished.

metadata.required_content: Authorized for transfer to External Auditor
